case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. OSCAR CANALES ARRIAGA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED AUG-14-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARRIAGA, OSCAR CANALES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARRIAGA, OSCAR CANALES $438.84 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $518.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ARRIAGA, OSCAR CANALES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $438.84 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT ARRIAGA, OSCAR CANALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2013 - JUDGMENT.
